jcs_vectors.name: rfc8785-number-string-safe-subset
jcs_vectors.note: Derived from RFC 8785 section 3.2.2; the 1e+30 member is omitted because ADDS rejects unsafe integral numbers.

jcs_vectors.name: rfc8785-utf16-property-order

value.ö: Latin Small Letter O With Diaeresis

jcs_vectors.canonical_json: {"\r":"Carriage Return","1":"One","":"Control","ö":"Latin Small Letter O With Diaeresis","€":"Euro Sign","😀":"Emoji: Grinning Face","דּ":"Hebrew Letter Dalet With Dagesh"}

cid_vectors.name: raw-28-byte-block-frame
cid_vectors.purpose: CID construction only; the zero tag is not an AES-GCM encryption vector.

canonical_vectors.name: minimal-empty-manifest
canonical_vectors.purpose: Unsigned-object JCS and signing-input digest; not a signed or encryption vector.

canonical_vectors.name: direct-read-grant-without-not-before
canonical_vectors.purpose: Unsigned-object JCS and signing-input digest; the zero key-wrap bytes are not a decryption vector.

test_material_notice: Every private key, DEK, nonce, and plaintext in the crypto fixtures is public deterministic test material and MUST NOT be used operationally.

signature_vectors.name: two-block-manifest-ed25519-signature-and-final-cid
signature_vectors.source_note: The Ed25519 seed/public key is RFC 8032 section 7.1 test 1; ADDS signs its own non-empty domain-separated message.

grant_wrap_vectors.name: direct-read-x25519-hkdf-aes-gcm-wrap-and-signed-grant
grant_wrap_vectors.source_note: The recipient and ephemeral X25519 keys are RFC 7748 section 6.1 Alice and Bob test keys, respectively.

expect.reason: The exact fetched bytes no longer hash to the requested CID.

expect.stage: Manifest descriptor versus Block-frame nonce comparison
expect.reason: A valid signature cannot make a descriptor nonce unequal to the addressed Block prefix.
Chunk indices must be contiguous from zero and equal their array positions.
Size 21 at chunk_size 10 requires three chunks, but only two are declared.

expect.stage: Grant Ed25519 signature verification before unwrap
expect.reason: The audience identifier is included in both the signed Grant and wrap context.

construction.description: Bob, the parent audience, issues a schema-valid, correctly signed and correctly wrapped Grant to Charlie but omits parent_grant.

expect.stage: publisher-rooted Grant authority validation before unwrap
expect.reason: A root Grant without parent_grant is authorized only when issuer and key equal the Manifest publisher.

expect.stage: Principal/signature public-key equality before Ed25519 verification

expect.reason: ADDS requires RFC 8032 verification; implementations MUST disable permissive ZIP 215 verification.

tamper_vectors.name: ed25519_small_order_r
tamper_vectors.derivation: Using the public RFC 8032 test seed from signature_vectors[0], set R to the canonical order-2 point and S = H(R || A || M) * a mod L. Cofactored verification accepts because [8]R is the identity.

expect.reason: ADDS rejects a small-order encoded R even when a cofactored verification equation succeeds.
ADDS requires signature point R to be prime-subgroup/torsion-free; a cofactored equation alone is insufficient.
RFC 7748 requires rejecting an all-zero shared secret.
